generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, I've always believed in being prepared. But have you noticed how civil defense funding keeps getting cut while we're told to 'trust the system'? My neighbor, a retired nurse, lost her home in the 2024 floods because emergency alerts failed. We can't just rely on promises. Real security means local preparedness too. #CommunityFirst #SafetyMatters
